title: Postgres brain.tool_calls table for observability
userStory: As an operator, I want every tool call recorded so that /admin can show real numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: Postgres table brain.tool_calls created with columns: id BIGSERIAL, occurred_at, session_id UUID, tool_name, input_json JSONB, output_json JSONB, status, latency_ms, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd
Indexes on (occurred_at DESC) and (tool_name, occurred_at DESC)
Migration committed via the chosen migration tool
